narrative:
Hubbard Twp B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 814 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.3 percentage points.
